---
title: "R Packages"
listing:
  id: pkg-listing
  contents: packages
  sort: "order"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  field-links: [title, image]
  image-height: "100px"
---

<style>
.listing-image img,
.quarto-grid-item .thumbnail img,
.quarto-grid-item img.thumbnail-image,
.quarto-grid-item .card-img-top {
  object-fit: contain !important;
  padding-top: 0.5rem !important;
  max-height: 100% !important;
}

.pkg-link {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #2c3e50;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}

.pkg-link:hover {
  color: #ff0000;
  text-decoration: underline;
}
</style>
